title: Æther & Umbra
tagline: A dark-aesthetic digital product studio built for constraint and clarity.
problem: A new brand needed both a visual identity and a functional storefront from scratch — one that felt considered and intentional without tipping into spiritual cliché.
solution: Greenfield Astro build with a centralized product data system, dynamic product detail pages, and Gumroad integration. Visual language established from zero — typography, palette, layout patterns — then shipped as a fully functional shop.
result: A complete multi-page storefront with a coherent brand identity, product grid, individual product pages, and a GitHub Actions deployment pipeline.
imageAlt: Æther & Umbra digital product studio website screenshot
